description: Mid-range adoption with articulated but overlapping decisions, mixed financial signals

decision_density.rationale: Specific decision_articulation about material thresholds but some overlap in exception handling

financial_gravity.rationale: Mix of HIGH and MEDIUM financial ratings; significant but not dominant costs

impact_proximity.rationale: Some FIRST-order impact on waste reduction; other benefits are SECOND-order

confidence_signal.rationale: Majority MEDIUM confidence; paint ops well-understood but data integration uncertain

anti_patterns: No sub-dimension should be 3 — signals are mixed across all dimensions
decision_density should NOT be 3 — overlapping exception flows prevent coherent sequencing
